classData.description: Converts platform-specific path separators to POSIX separators for stable JSON output.
classData.name: toPosixPath

classData.description: Returns a repo-relative path when possible, otherwise a normalized absolute path.
classData.name: formatOutputPath

classData.description: Creates the Commander program used by the CLI and unit tests.
classData.name: createProgram

classData.description: Parses CLI arguments using Commander failure semantics.
classData.name: parseArgs

classData.comment:
/**
 * Strips simple block and line comments from one source line for deterministic LOC accounting.
 * This is intentionally lexical, not language-semantic; it is good enough for cohesion budgets
 * without pretending to be a parser for every file type under `ai/`.
 * @param {string} line
 * @param {{jsBlock: boolean, htmlBlock: boolean}} state
 * @param {string} ext
 * @returns {string}
 */
classData.description: Strips simple block and line comments from one source line for deterministic LOC accounting. This is intentionally lexical, not language-semantic; it is good enough for cohesion budgets without pretending to be a parser for every file type under ai/.
classData.name: stripCommentText
countCodeLoc

classData.comment:
/**
 * Creates file descriptors for one directory.
 * @param {string} folderPath
 * @param {Array<Object>} files
 * @param {{includeFiles: boolean, includeLoc: boolean}} options
 * @returns {(Array<string>|Array<Object>|undefined)}
 */
classData.name: buildFileList

classData.comment:
/**
 * Builds a deterministic structure map for a filesystem root.
 * @param {Object} options
 * @param {string} [options.root]
 * @param {string} [options.cwd]
 * @param {boolean} [options.includeFiles]
 * @param {boolean} [options.includeLoc]
 * @returns {Object}
 */
classData.description: Builds a deterministic structure map for a filesystem root.
classData.name: buildStructureMap

classData.comment:
/**
 * Runs the CLI and writes deterministic JSON to stdout.
 * @param {string[]} [argv]
 * @param {Object} [io]
 * @param {string} [io.cwd]
 * @param {{write: Function}} [io.stdout]
 * @returns {Promise<{root:string, folders:Array}>}
 */
classData.description: Runs the CLI and writes deterministic JSON to stdout.
classData.name: writeStructureMap

classData.comment:
/**
 * Programmatic entry point used by unit tests.
 * @param {string[]} [argv]
 * @param {Object} [io]
 * @param {string} [io.cwd]
 * @param {{write: Function}} [io.stdout]
 * @returns {Promise<{root:string, folders:Array}>}
 */
classData.description: Programmatic entry point used by unit tests.
classData.name: main
